alt: The white 18th-century viceregal mansion that houses Museo Larco in Lima, with cascading red and orange bougainvillea on the walls, terracotta planters in the foreground, and the Peruvian flag flying centered above the entrance
description: Exterior of Museo Larco in the Pueblo Libre district of Lima — an 18th-century viceregal mansion housing one of the most important pre-Columbian collections in the Americas. Bougainvillea drapes the white stucco walls; the Peruvian flag flies above the central entrance.
title: Museo Larco
